title: maytenus cunninghamii
intro: Maytenus cunninghamii, also known as New Zealand mayten or Kawakawa's relative, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Maytenus cunninghamii is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
